PUPPET_FILE
  Puppet: CLASS_DEFINITION
    PsiElement(CLASS)('class')
    PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
    PsiPuppetFqnContainerImpl(FQN_CONTAINER)
      Puppet: NAMESPACE_DEFINITION
        PsiElement(NAME)('config')
      PsiElement(::)('::')
      PsiElement(NAME)('versions')
    PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
    PsiPuppetBracedStatementsBlockImpl(BRACED_STATEMENTS_BLOCK)
      PsiElement({)('{')
      PsiWhiteSpace('\n  ')
      PsiPuppetExpressionAssignmentImpl(EXPRESSION_ASSIGNMENT)
        Puppet: VAR_WRAPPER
          PsiElement($)('$')
          PsiElement(VARIABLE_NAME)('var0')
        PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
        PsiElement(=)('=')
        PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
        PsiPuppetArrayImpl(ARRAY)
          PsiElement(LIST_START[)('[')
          PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
          PsiPuppetExpressionNumericImpl(EXPRESSION_NUMERIC)
            PsiElement(INTEGER_LITERAL_WITHOUTQ)('1')
          PsiElement(,)(',')
          PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
          PsiPuppetExpressionNumericImpl(EXPRESSION_NUMERIC)
            PsiElement(INTEGER_LITERAL_WITHOUTQ)('2')
          PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
          PsiElement(])(']')
      PsiWhiteSpace('\n  ')
      PsiPuppetExpressionAssignmentImpl(EXPRESSION_ASSIGNMENT)
        Puppet: VAR_WRAPPER
          PsiElement($)('$')
          PsiElement(VARIABLE_NAME)('var')
        PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
        PsiElement(=)('=')
        PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
        PsiPuppetArrayImpl(ARRAY)
          PsiElement(LIST_START[)('[')
          PsiWhiteSpace('\n    ')
          PsiPuppetQuotedTextImpl(QUOTED_TEXT)
            PsiElement(SINGLE_QUOTED_STRING)(''1'')
          PsiElement(,)(',')
          PsiWhiteSpace('\n    ')
          PsiPuppetQuotedTextImpl(QUOTED_TEXT)
            PsiElement(SINGLE_QUOTED_STRING)(''2'')
          PsiElement(,)(',')
          PsiWhiteSpace('\n  ')
          PsiElement(])(']')
      PsiWhiteSpace('\n')
      PsiElement(})('}')
